pods.name: Assessment Pod
pods.description: Evaluates your environment, identifies gaps, and establishes your security baseline.

specialists.description: Leads the assessment, coordinates findings, produces the executive summary.
Performs technical testing, validates findings, documents evidence.
Executes penetration tests, red-team simulations, and validation checks.

engagementImpact.collaborationPattern: Fixed-term sprint with weekly reviews and discovery workshops

pods.name: Engineering Pod
pods.description: Designs, implements, and validates security controls across your environment.

specialists.description: Designs the control architecture and reviews implementation decisions.
Implements, configures, and tests controls in your environment.
Connects security controls into your existing tooling and workflows.

engagementImpact.collaborationPattern: Embedded delivery with bi-weekly steering and structured handoff

pods.name: Operations Pod
pods.description: Provides continuous monitoring, detection engineering, and operational support.

specialists.description: Monitors alerts, triages incidents, and operates detection tools.
Conducts proactive hunts for adversary activity and attacker techniques.
Investigates and contains security incidents end-to-end.

engagementImpact.collaborationPattern: Ongoing service with weekly operational reviews and monthly reporting

pods.name: Incident Response Pod
pods.description: Prepares your team for incidents and responds when they happen.

specialists.description: Commands response operations, communicates with leadership, and owns the post-incident review.
Analyzes affected systems, traces attack paths, and preserves evidence.
Implements containment, eradication, and recovery measures.

engagementImpact.collaborationPattern: Retainer for readiness; activate on-demand for live incidents

pods.name: Architecture Pod
pods.description: Provides strategic security architecture guidance and program design.

specialists.description: Defines the strategic security architecture and provides advisory-level guidance.
Translates architecture decisions into technical designs and reference implementations.

engagementImpact.collaborationPattern: Advisory cadence with structured workshops and architecture reviews
